Infra tree: every node click (region/zone/DC/compute/container/device)
shows detail card in right pane with Edit button and back navigation.

JAR can deploy to servers/VMs/containers, Docker/LXC only to servers/VMs.

targets. Backend validation on create/write/deploy.

commit.message:
Fix citation filename extraction for names containing commas

Filenames like 'Уведомление по чл. 19, пар. 1 от Регламент...' contain
commas, so splitting by comma and taking only segment[1] truncated them.
Now extracts everything between the ticker (first segment) and page/source
refs (last segments matching p.N or Source N pattern).

* fix: 🔥 修复React Hooks规则违规 - AgentDisplayPanel

问题根源：
- early return在useMemo之前，违反Hooks必须相同顺序调用的规则
- 当selectedAgent为null时return，导致后续Hooks不被调用
- 当selectedAgent有值时，Hooks会被调用，导致Hook数量不一致

解决方案：
- 将useMemo移到early return之前
- 在useMemo内部处理null情况
- 确保所有Hooks在每次渲染中都被调用

这是导致白屏和错误的根本原因！

fix: prevent dev login UI flash when `DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=false` (#77)

* fix: detect duplicate .env keys before services start

Duplicate keys in .env cause silent misconfiguration — Docker Compose
takes the last value, which can differ from what the user expects
(e.g. DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED appearing twice with conflicting values).

- Add `env-check` service (alpine, ephemeral) to docker-compose.yml
  that validates .env for duplicate keys before `api` starts
- Add duplicate detection to `scripts/check-env.sh` (before `source`)
- Add `check-env` Makefile target; `up-prod` now depends on it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: prevent dev login UI flash when DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=false

While authConfig is loading, `devLoginEnabled` evaluated to `true`
because `authConfig?.dev_login_enabled ?? !googleClientId` resolved
to `undefined ?? !undefined` → `true`. This caused the dev login
buttons to flash briefly before the /auth/config response arrived.

Change the fallback from `!googleClientId` to `false` so nothing
renders until config is loaded.
